entities.name: V (Vrijen)
entities.context: Founder of Careerspan, describes workflows and tools he uses including Zo

entities.name: Daniel
entities.context: Collaborator or contact who recalls V describing a voice-note-to-AI workflow and now uses AI tools himself

entities.name: Zo
entities.context: Personal AI computer with full file system, persistent content library, and email generator

entities.name: Voice-Note-to-AI Workflow
entities.context: Record voice notes/rambles, feed to AI with instructions to only organize existing ideas (no new facts) into structured outlines or drafts

entities.name: Content Library
entities.context: Persistent library within Zo that stores articles and resources for later automated reference

entities.name: Built In
entities.context: Publication where V has a published article, used as example of content dropped into Zo

entities.name: Email Generator
entities.context: Zo feature that pulls from past articles or resources to generate follow-up emails or content

relationships.context: V uses Zo as his personal AI computer for content management and email generation
V described this workflow to Daniel; records voice notes and has AI organize them without adding new facts
Daniel now finds the workflow approachable since he started using AI tools himself
Daniel recalls V describing the voice-note workflow in the past
Zo includes a persistent content library as a core feature
Zo includes an email generator that references stored content
